entry.title: New: Bill 171, CD1, FD1 (2024) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING CHAPTER 19.90A, MAUI COUNTY CODE, RELATING TO KĪHEI-MĀKENA PROJECT DISTRICT 9 (WAILEA 670)" The purpose of this bill is to amend the Project District ordinance for Kīhei-Mākena Project District 9 (Wailea 670) for about 670 acres identified for real property tax purposes as tax map keys (2) 2-1-008:056 and 071.

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
